genomes.description: Interactive entropy visualization with animated particles
Stochastic random walk patterns on canvas
Gravity and particle physics with falling objects
Wave pattern generation with ripple effects
Text generation UI showing thinking states
Experimental loading indicators exploring thinking metaphors
Real-time text sentiment analysis with industrial visualization (React/TypeScript)
Grid Trace - Interactive grid path visualization with Geist Pixel font
Execution Trace Graph - AI response visualized as a traversal through a skill graph
Resonant Lattice - Interactive physics grid with mass-spring damper nodes
Reaction-Diffusion - Gray-Scott model simulation with interactive parameter controls
ASCII Animated Grid - Hypnotic 100x100 text grid with 5 distinct physical simulation modes
Interactive force-directed graph visualizing relationships between projects and data concepts
ASCII Loading — dual-grid crystallization animation with face emergence and progress bar
Constrained Variation — fix the scaffold, switch the algorithm, compare simultaneously
Five chapters, three palettes: Peach, Clay, and Aus — same sketch system remapped through different color identities
Geometric shapes explorer — lines, arcs, and curves organized into chapters with animated parameter tweaking
Font Explorer — skill to visualize any font
Terminal REPL — minimal shell interface with boot sequence, command streaming, and ASCII cat
Ube Kaizen — enter 3 colors and explore them as accents, tints, blends, data viz, and typographic pairings
Viz Grouped — reference gallery of visualization types grouped by analytical goal
Mode Toggle — component reference sheet exploring a binary toggle across 9 families, composed examples, and 10 input combinations
ASCII Field Gallery — 8 animated ASCII wave fields rendered on canvas, each a distinct sine/cosine interference formula through a dot-density glyph ramp
Audio Reactive ASCII Field — ube wave field driven by microphone input; 8 character vocabularies, floating control bar, settings modal for reactivity tuning
